Details: Two studies showed that oxidation of the microcystin M-LR in water by hydrogen peroxide is not effective. No significant control of M-LR was observed. Another study assessed removal of M-LR and M-RR by catalytic wet peroxide oxidation (CWPO) using modified natural magnetite (Fe3O4-R400/H2O2). This modified process yielded better removal results (64% for M-LR and >95% for M-RR).
